zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Horton於大約1295年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利時，他的父親John de Horton17歲，母親Maude de Bosco16歲。他和Mrs. Thomas De Horton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1377年在英國享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Horton于大约1295年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾莫福斯利时，他的父亲John de Horton17岁，母亲Maude de Bosco16岁。他和Mrs. Thomas De Horton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1377年在英国享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Horton was born about 1295, in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, his father, John de Horton, was 17 and his mother, Maude de Bosco, was 16. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Thomas De Horton. He died in 1377, in England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Horton est né environ 1295, à Mowsley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Horton, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maude de Bosco, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Thomas De Horton. Il est décédé en 1377, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Horton um 1295 in Mowsley, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Horton 17 und seine Mutter Maude de Bosco 16. Er hatte mit Mrs. Thomas De Horton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 83 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Horton è nato il circa 1295 nel Mowsley, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John de Horton, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Maude de Bosco, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Thomas De Horton. Morì nel 1377, nel England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Hortonが約1295年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアモウスリーで生まれた時，父John de Hortonは17歳，母Maude de Boscoは16歳であった。彼はMrs. Thomas De Hortonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1377年にイギリスで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Horton(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 레이스스터실르 모우슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Horton(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude de Bosco(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Mrs. Thomas De Horton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Horton nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Horton, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Bosco, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Thomas De Horton. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Horton родился около 1295 г. в местности моусли, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Horton было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Bosco, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Thomas De Horton. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Horton nació aproximadamente 1295, en Mowsley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Horton, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Maude de Bosco, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Thomas De Horton. Murió en 1377, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
